response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for both 'Laser Beam' and 'Debayashi Japonism'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song lyrics. Manual transcription was performed for the performer's MC talk between the two songs. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal activation. Visual title cards were included as per the Visual Events rule. Aggressive truncation was used during rapid segments of 'Debayashi Japonism' to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original:
レーザービーム
作詞・作曲：中田ヤスタカ
subtitles.english:
[Title: Laser Beam]
Lyrics & Composition: Yasutaka Nakata

subtitles.original: ストレイト
subtitles.english: Straight

subtitles.original: ドキドキする
subtitles.english: Heart pounding

subtitles.original: 視線はまるでレーザービーム
subtitles.english: Your gaze is like a laser beam

subtitles.original: 心をシュワりと突き刺すの
subtitles.english: Piercing my heart with a swoosh

subtitles.original: 虹色のラブビーム
subtitles.english: A rainbow-colored love beam

subtitles.original: 実る果実が水を弾いて
subtitles.english: Ripe fruit bouncing off water

subtitles.original: キラキラしてる光に似てる
subtitles.english: Resembling sparkling light

subtitles.original: グラウンドに立つキミの姿が
subtitles.english: Your figure standing on the ground

subtitles.original: まぶしくて 少し照れちゃうけど
subtitles.english: Is so dazzling, it makes me blush a bit

subtitles.original: ストレイト
subtitles.english: Straight

subtitles.original: まっすぐだね
subtitles.english: You're so direct

subtitles.original: 恋愛はきっとレーザービーム
subtitles.english: Love is definitely a laser beam

subtitles.original: 心をシュワりと突き刺すの
subtitles.english: Piercing my heart with a swoosh

subtitles.original: 虹色のラブビーム
subtitles.english: A rainbow-colored love beam

subtitles.original: ふたりを繋ぐ 秘密の光
subtitles.english: The secret light that connects us

subtitles.original: あの日見つけた 秘密の光
subtitles.english: The secret light we found that day

subtitles.original: 恋の瞬間 音は止まって
subtitles.english: The moment of love, the sound stops

subtitles.original: 時間はスローリーに 恋の光線
subtitles.english: And time goes slowly, a love beam of light

subtitles.original: ストレイト
subtitles.english: Straight

subtitles.original: ドキドキする
subtitles.english: Heart pounding

subtitles.original: 視線はまるでレーザービーム
subtitles.english: Your gaze is like a laser beam

subtitles.original: 心をシュワりと突き刺すの
subtitles.english: Piercing my heart with a swoosh

subtitles.original: 虹色のラブビーム
subtitles.english: A rainbow-colored love beam

subtitles.original: いよーっ！
subtitles.english: Iyooo!

subtitles.original: 寄ってらっしゃい 見てらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Step right up, come take a look!

subtitles.original: 始まりましたね！
subtitles.english: It's started!

subtitles.original:
出囃子ジャポニズム
作詞・作曲：本多友紀 (Arte Refact)
subtitles.english:
[Title: Debayashi Japonism]
Lyrics & Comp: Yuki Honda (Arte Refact)

subtitles.original: 新衣装お披露目3Dライブ！
subtitles.english: The new outfit reveal 3D live!

subtitles.original: 今夜はまだまだこれから！
subtitles.english: Tonight is just beginning!

subtitles.original: 皆さん一緒に盛り上がっていきましょう！
subtitles.english: Let's all get excited together!

subtitles.original: 尽きない好奇心
subtitles.english: Curiosity that never ends

subtitles.original: 素晴らしきジャポニズムに触れて
subtitles.english: Touching on the splendor of Japonism

subtitles.original: 令和の風雲児
subtitles.english: The rising star of the Reiwa era

subtitles.original: 皆々にお届け致しましょう
subtitles.english: We shall deliver it to everyone

subtitles.original: 饒舌に情熱
subtitles.english: Passion in eloquence

subtitles.original: 伝えたい愛に溢れている
subtitles.english: Overflowing with the love I want to convey

subtitles.original: 無知の知がきっと
subtitles.english: Knowing that we know nothing will surely

subtitles.original: 素敵な始まりになるんだよ
subtitles.english: Become a wonderful beginning

subtitles.original: (もっと)知って
subtitles.english: (More) I want you to know

subtitles.original: (もっと)欲しい
subtitles.english: (more)

subtitles.original: たらふく味わって
subtitles.english: Taste it until you've had your fill

subtitles.original: (とことん)尊い
subtitles.english: (Thoroughly) Precious

subtitles.original: (とことん)人生
subtitles.english: (thoroughly) life

subtitles.original: 紐解いた歴史に
subtitles.english: Unraveled history

subtitles.original: 心惹かれていく
subtitles.english: My heart is drawn to it

subtitles.original: 遥か遠く電波に乗ってあなたまで
subtitles.english: Far away, riding the airwaves to reach you!

subtitles.original: この想い純粋に伝えたい
subtitles.english: I want to convey this feeling purely!

subtitles.original: 新しい世界
subtitles.english: A brand new world

subtitles.original: 見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll show it to you!

subtitles.original: 開口一番やっちゃって
subtitles.english: First things first, let's get it started!

subtitles.original: 破天荒に型破って打ち立てる
subtitles.english: Breaking the mold in an unprecedented way, we build!

subtitles.original: 金字塔パンチライン時を超え
subtitles.english: A monumental punchline, crossing through time!

subtitles.original: 出囃子に乗せて
subtitles.english: Riding on the entrance music

subtitles.original: 寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Step right up, come take a look!
